title: Caramelized Melon Stir-fry
description: A fresh and creamy Japanese-inspired dish featuring caramelize melons suitable for date nights or any casual meal time.
instructions: Wash and slice the cantaloupe into thin rounds.
In a small bowl, mix honey syrup and vanilla extract until well combined.
Heat coconut milk in a pan over medium heat. Remove from heat when it starts to simmer.
Brush each melon round with the honey-vanilla mixture and place on a preheated skillet drizzled with a little oil.
Add red pepper flakes if desired for an extra kick of flavor. Cook for about 2-3 minutes per side until caramelized and slightly charred.
Remove from heat, garnish with sliced fresh mint leaves, and serve warm or at room temperature.
